response.justification: Bogdan is a strong software engineer with excellent fundamentals in clean architecture, TDD, and large-scale systems. However, the role requires specialized expertise in Java, Kotlin, Spring, and IDE/language tooling—areas where his recent experience is limited. His last substantial Java work was 6+ years ago at National Instruments and Altom, and his current trajectory at re:cinq focuses on TypeScript, Node.js, and AI infrastructure, moving away from the JVM ecosystem. While his learning ability and engineering practices are strong, he would need significant domain ramp-up compared to candidates with recent, deep JVM tooling experience.
strengths: Excellent software engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, and mentorship through workshops and courses
Proven ability to handle large-scale, complex systems (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby, multi-country optimization at Optilyz)
Strong communication and collaboration skills demonstrated through open-source projects, teaching, and cross-functional team work
concerns: No recent Java or Kotlin experience—last substantial JVM work was 6+ years ago; current role emphasizes TypeScript, Node.js, and AI infrastructure
No demonstrated experience with Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, build tools (Maven/Gradle), or other enterprise frameworks required for the role
No background in IDE internals, language tooling, or developer tool development; career trajectory diverges from JVM ecosystem specialization

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and demonstrated learning ability
Career momentum away from JVM toward web/AI stack
